title: Filipino Fish Roast with Garlic
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring fish roasted with Filipino spices and a hint of garlic.
instructions: Rinse fish under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
Season with salt, black pepper, and a pinch of roast.
Drizzle olive oil over fish, making sure to coat evenly.
Roast the fish for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While fish is roasting, melt 1 tbsp of roast in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Remove from heat and set aside.
Once fish is done, place on a plate and top with garlic-roast sauce.
Serve with lemon wedges on the side, if desired.
